notes: Full fidelity follow-up to the approved Option 1 preview: treats the mockup as the target rather than only fixing isolated complaints.
Rebalances colors and textures using non-repeating file-based backgrounds for the page, sidebar, dashboard panel, cards, and soft surfaces.

Slims and calms the sidebar/brand, moves the safety note into the sidebar, removes the extra bottom home support row, reduces stat-card scale, and restyles home cards to match the dark vertical Option 1 card language.
